steps.title: Target historical similarity
steps.content: The goal is not just to compare visual features; it is to emphasize a shared historical role for Hadid's The Peak and Gehry's Gehry House.

steps.title: Choose the shared event
steps.content: A discusses architects more broadly instead of the two projects. B gives the wrong date for The Peak. C emphasizes similar jagged forms, a design similarity rather than a historical one. Both projects were featured together in the influential 1988 MoMA exhibition. The answer is D.
